Work Experience.Description: Designed and deployed a production-grade ML-based property valuation model achieving 90% prediction accuracy , enhancing investor decision-making and reducing manual analyst review time by 60%. Implemented CI/CD pipelines withMLflow experiment tracking and DVC versioning for reproducible, auditable model deployments across staging and production.  Deployed a FastAPI REST ML inference service onAWS EC2 delivering real-time predictions at sub-100ms latency for live platform users.

Engineered large-scale ETL and web scraping pipelines automating collection of 50,000+ property listings , cutting data acquisition time by 95%.  Prototyped an NLP-driven recommendation engine (TF-IDF + cosine similarity) later scaled into a full production-ready system during the full-time role.
